title: Extract Phone Numbers
scenario: Extract phone numbers from the following phone numbers: 123-456-7890, 098-765-4321, 555-123-4567. The output should be a comma-separated list of extracted phone numbers.
constraints: Must be in the standard phone number format (XXX-XXX-XXXX)

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the format and character constraints.
Verify if each extracted phone number is in the standard format (XXX-XXX-XXXX).
